allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Creative\\The Void Series\\Fighters Of The Void\\assets\\" -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 500000 } | Select-Object Name, @{Name="SizeMB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 20)
Bash(node --check "/c/Creative/The Void Series/Fighters Of The Void/Fighters Of The Void v59.html")

Bash(sed -i "s|await page.waitForTimeout\(4500\);|for \(let w = 0; w < 24; w++\) { await page.waitForTimeout\(500\); if \(await page.evaluate\(\(\) => !!game.boss && !game.boss.entering\)\) break; } await page.waitForTimeout\(3500\);|" drive6.js)
